titleStmt.title: SII 26.359: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 359. (A.R. No. 340 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same maṇḍapa.
This inscription is built in at the beginning.

It appears to record lands with a total extent of 1,000 kuḻi in some localities by a certain Pallavaraiyaṉ for various services, nandā lamp, and offerings to the god of the temple of Tiruviṟkōlamuḍaiyanāyaṉār, and the acceptance of the gift by the tāṉikar of the temple who had undertaken to carry out the object of the gift.

Representing the donors, Kuṟumuḍich Chūḍiyanāyaṉ Pallavaraiyaṉ, and Kurumuḍit-Tiruvēṅkaṭapperumāḷ Irāśanārāyaṇap Pallavaraiyaṉ figure as signatories. Among the tāṉikars Tiru Aṇṇāmalaiuḍaiyāṉ Śōmaṉā-bhaṭṭaṉ of Gautama-[gōtra] and Poṟkōyinambi Sōmaṉādēvaṉ of Kāśyapa-[gōtra] figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Beginning built in.vaṉ Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku tirupuvaṉamāteviviḷākattil Eṉ kāṇiyile paṉṉiraṭik kolāle pālāṟṟil tirumañcaṉam nāṉvaḻi Orukuṭam Eṭuttu Āṭi Aruḷappaṇṇa viṭṭa poṟtāmarai Ettam ku 4 100m Oru tirunantāviḷakkukku viṭṭa puḷi Ettak kuṇṭilum Eṭṭi Ettak kuṇṭilum ku 4 100 nāḷvaḻi ciṟukālai cantikkum A(m)mutupaṭikku viṭṭa tirumaṭai viḷākattil teṉciṟakil nāṉ Eṟiaruḷa
yil Irācātirāca viḷākattil Eṉkāṇi Āṉa kiḻai Āṉantameṉikkollai Āṉa pallavarāyaṉ tiruttoppil maṇṭapattile Eṟi Aruḷa viṭṭa Ikkollai nālu taricukkum naṭu ku 4 100 Āka ku 1000 6 100 Ikkuḻi Āyirattu Aṟunūṟum Ikkoyilil tāṉikar kaikkoṇṭu Inta Upaiyaṅkaḷ cantiṟātittavaraiyum vaṟ naṭattak kaṭavarkaḷākavum nāḷvaḻi ciṟukālaiccanti A(m)mutu ceytāl tiruppāṭṭu Otiṉa tirumeṉikku ṉāḻi Aricip piracātamum tiruppaḷḷittāmam Eṭukkum tiru meṉikku ṉāḻi Arici picātamum caṭa
ntiṟātittavaraiyum tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka caṟuvamāṉṉiya Iṟaiili Āka Iṉṉilaṅkaḷ kalnāṭṭik kuṭutteṉ Inta Upaiyaṅkaḷil nām ṇ ri Eṉvaḻiyuluḷḷa kaṭavārkaḷākavum Ivai tāḻvaranaṭattātavaruḷ tāḻvara naṭattu viṭātavarkaḷ Intaṉmattukku virotam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ mahāpātakam paṇṇiṉa pāvam peṟakkaṭavārkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṟumuṭic cūṭiyanāyaṉ pallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṟumuṭit tiruveṅkaṭapperumāḷ Irācanārāyaṇa pallaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Uṭaiyārkku Inta Upaiyaṅkaḷ tap pāmal cantiṟātittavaraiyum naṭattuvatu Ā
kac cammatittuppallavarāyar viṭṭa nilaṅkaḷ Uḷtukaikkoṇṭom tiruviṟkolamuṭai ṉāyaṉār koyilil
tāṉikarom Ippaṭikku Ivai gautamaṉ tiru Aṇṇāmalai Uṭaiyāṉ comaṉā paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Aṟiveṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai
kāśyapaṉ poṟkkoyil nampi comaṉātevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiyākacamu
ttira piramārāyaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ pārtivaṉ ceṉṉel vaiytāṉa
Digital edition of SII 26.359 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
